seo.title: GRAND DOM — Real Estate Agency Warsaw
seo.description: GRAND DOM — real estate agency in Warsaw. We specialize in apartment sales, purchases and long-term rentals in Warsaw and Masovia. Investments in Spain.
seo.keywords: real estate Warsaw, apartments for sale Warsaw, property Warsaw, real estate agency Poland, buy apartment Warsaw, rent Warsaw, investment Spain, nieruchomości Warszawa

hero.heading: GRAND DOM
hero.text: A fresh approach to the real estate market. We specialize in sales, purchases and rentals in Warsaw and the Masovian region. We also offer investments in sunny Spain.

contact.heading: Let's start
contact.intro: Write, call or come over for a coffee. We reply within 24 hours — no automated messages, no pressure.

realEstateServicesSubtitle: Comprehensive solutions tailored to your needs in the Warsaw real estate market.
realEstateServicesDescription: A small team that knows Warsaw district by district. We guide you from the first conversation to receiving the keys.

realEstateServices.title: Apartment Sales in Warsaw
realEstateServices.description: Comprehensive service for selling apartments, houses and commercial spaces in Warsaw and the Masovian region.

realEstateServices.title: Property Purchase
realEstateServices.description: Assistance in finding the ideal property tailored to your needs and budget.

realEstateServices.title: Long-term Rentals
realEstateServices.description: Professional management of private and commercial rental properties.

realEstateServices.title: Legal Advisory
realEstateServices.description: Comprehensive legal support for real estate transactions.

realEstateServices.title: Investment Advisory
realEstateServices.description: Professional guidance on real estate investments in the Polish market.

realEstateServices.title: Investments in Spain
realEstateServices.description: Opportunity to invest in sunny Spanish properties with management and passive income options.

propertyShowcase.label: Premium properties
propertyShowcase.heading: Elegant interiors,
propertyShowcase.description: Our listings are apartments in verified locations – with a good layout, bright view and a neighbourhood you'll want to stay in. We view each one in person before it goes on the market.

spanishInvestment.heading: 🇪🇸 Spain — An investment that gives more!
spanishInvestment.intro: Beyond Warsaw, we open doors to the Spanish market. With a local partner who knows every address – and makes sure the investment delivers what we promised.
benefits: Assistance with formalities and local management
spanishInvestment.guaranteeNote: Guaranteed return on investment — terms agreed individually in the contract

visionMission.title: Our Vision & Mission
visionMission.intro: As a new company, we are guided by ambitious goals and a clear vision for the future
visionMission.visionText: To become a leading real estate agency in Warsaw, helping clients find their dream homes and achieve investment success in the Polish and Spanish markets.
visionMission.missionText: To deliver exceptional real estate services that deliver measurable results, support innovation and create lasting partnerships with our clients.

futureGoals.title: Leader in Warsaw
futureGoals.description: Become a recognized brand on the Warsaw real estate market within two years.

futureGoals.title: Service Expansion
futureGoals.description: Expand the offer to include comprehensive investment services and property management.

futureGoals.title: Spanish Adventure
futureGoals.description: Help 50+ investors achieve passive income from Spanish properties.

values.heading: Our Values
values.subtitle: Principles that guide everything we do and define us as a company.

items.title: Excellence
items.description: We strive for excellence in every project, delivering results that exceed expectations.

items.title: Integrity
items.description: Trust and transparency are the foundation of all our client relationships.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We use modern technologies and creative solutions to solve complex challenges.

items.title: Collaboration

items: We know Warsaw district by district
